replace: RunPins.environment with exact EnvironmentId, Revision, and Digest
invariants: W8 remains the sole owner of Environment records
Run state stores only the immutable pin identity
Agent, effective PolicySet, ModelPolicy, and Environment pins each contain their canonical ID, Revision, and Digest
RunConfigurationSnapshot does not duplicate source IDs or digests outside RunPins
A referenced Environment revision remains resolvable while pinned
acceptance: Multiple Environment pins cannot alias by revision alone
Run codecs round-trip exact EnvironmentId, Revision, and Digest
Run migration validates the complete target exact-source pin set before installation
W5 source revision verification resolves the W8-owned record without copying it
